seo.title: Free SEO Audit | 24-Hour Human-Written Report | Content Cucumber
seo.meta_description: We run a free SEO and AEO audit on your website and deliver a written report to your inbox within one business day. 56+ point checklist. No sales call required.

thankyou.link_text: While you wait, read the 56+ point methodology

data.title: Free SEO + AEO audit of your website. In your inbox in 24 hours.
paragraphs: Send us your URL. A real human applies our 56+ point checklist to your site and emails you the PDF report within one business day.
No CMS access. No analytics login. No sales call required. The audit is the deliverable.
data.content_image_alt: Cover of the 56+ point AEO + SEO audit checklist PDF that Content Cucumber delivers

data.title: What lands in your inbox tomorrow
data.subtitle: Every deliverable comes from public sources. We do not need any access to your systems to run this.

items.title: A 56+ point scorecard
items.text: Pass, Partial, or Fail on every item across twelve categories: technical, on-page, schema, performance, content quality, AI search readiness, local SEO, and migration.

items.title: An AI citation check
items.text: Your target queries run through ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. You see who gets cited and what your competitors do differently.

items.title: Core Web Vitals diagnostics
items.text: LCP, INP, and CLS measured from public PageSpeed Insights. A Pixel 5 emulated view of what Google's mobile crawler renders before any user interaction.

items.title: A prioritized fix list
items.text: Every issue tagged Critical, High, Medium, or Low. Implementation guidance for WordPress, Shopify, Magento, BigCommerce, and custom platforms. Your team can ship it without translation.

data.eyebrow: Why a human runs this, not a tool
data.title: Tools flag issues. They do not fix them.
paragraphs: A typical SEO tool returns 400 issues on a mid-size site. Some are critical. Most are noise. None come with the judgment to tell you which 40 actually move rankings and revenue this quarter.
Our audit adds the layer the tool cannot. Every finding is graded against the 56+ checks, ranked by impact, and written in plain language your team can act on this week.
You get the tool data. You also get the read on what to do about it.

data.title: From request to report in 24 hours

steps.title: Submit your URL
steps.text: Email and website only. Company name is optional. No CMS, no analytics, no Search Console access required.

steps.title: We confirm receipt
steps.text: You get a confirmation email immediately with your request reference. Includes the expected delivery window.

steps.title: A human runs the audit
steps.text: We apply the full 56+ point checklist to your site, score every item Pass / Partial / Fail, and write the implementation guidance for your platform.

steps.title: PDF in your inbox
steps.text: The full audit lands in your inbox within one business day. Yours to act on, hand to your team, or talk to us about implementation.

data.title: Want to see our methodology first?
data.text: Every audit applies the same 56+ checks across 12 categories. The full methodology is documented in the checklist. Read it before you submit your URL, or hand it to your team to run themselves.

items.question: What does the free audit include?
items.answer: The full 56+ point checklist applied to your site, with Pass, Partial, or Fail scoring on every item, plus a prioritized remediation plan. No obligation. No sales call required.

items.question: What platforms do you audit?
items.answer: WordPress, Shopify, Magento, BigCommerce, WooCommerce, and custom platforms. The audit methodology works on any website. Implementation support is strongest on WordPress and Shopify.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Within 24 business hours from when we receive your request. Complex sites (1,000+ pages, multiple subdomains, multi-location) may take longer. We confirm timing in the confirmation email.

items.question: How is this different from a tool report?
items.answer: A tool flags 400 issues. It cannot tell you which 40 matter, which take five minutes to fix, and which need a sprint. We add the human judgment. Same data, different output.

items.question: Do you cover AI search and citations?
items.answer: Yes. We audit your llms.txt, your passage-level structuring, and we check whether ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews are surfacing your brand for target queries.

items.question: Do you handle migrations?
items.answer: Yes. Migration recovery is one of our most-requested engagements. If you have a traffic cliff, the first 30 days are usually recoverable. Waiting six months usually is not.

items.question: What happens after I get the audit?
items.answer: Nothing automatic. You can act on the findings yourself, hand them to your existing team, or talk to us about a paid engagement to implement the fixes.

data.title: Want to see where your site stands?
data.text: The full 56+ point audit. Pass, Partial, or Fail on every item. Prioritized fixes ranked by impact. In your inbox within 24 hours.
